metadata.description: Workflow plugins from 49x.ai for operators — Telegram bots, Chief-of-Staff routines, and other custom AI workflows.

plugins.name: cos-bot
plugins.description: A Telegram bot that's also a Chief of Staff. Five recipes (/prep, /inbox-triage, /awaiting, /who, /catchup), three voice presets, brain-dump capture. /cos-bot:start dispatches the right next command.

plugins.name: gws-proxy
plugins.description: Shared Google Workspace CLI access. /gws-proxy:add-account <alias> <email> creates gws-<alias> profiles backed by a single shared OAuth client so users get gmail/calendar/drive in seconds without touching GCP.
